creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
> /stand/sysinstall complains that it is unable ftp-fetch
> ``mp-letter-3.0.1'' from ftp.freebsd.org and the ports tarball for
> 3.0-RELEASE also doesn't contain ``mp-letter-3.0.1'', hence I consider
> this a bug.
